envVarDetails.name: HAPI_FQDN
envVarDetails.description: Fully Qualified Domain Name for the HAPI server (used in MCP tool URLs)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_HOME
envVarDetails.description: Directory path for HAPI configuration and specs. Should be mounted as a volume in Docker

envVarDetails.name: PROJECT_NAME
envVarDetails.description: The name of the project/API (alternative to positional argument)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_OPENAPI
envVarDetails.description: OpenAPI spec URL or path (alternative to --openapi flag)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_URL
envVarDetails.description: Backend API base URL (alternative to --url flag)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_PORT
envVarDetails.description: Server port (alternative to --port flag) - this is the internal container port

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_HEADLESS
envVarDetails.description: Enable headless mode (alternative to --headless flag)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_MCP
envVarDetails.description: Enable MCP mode (alternative to --mcp flag)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_DEV
envVarDetails.description: Enable development mode (alternative to --dev flag)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_CORS
envVarDetails.description: Comma-separated allowed CORS origins (alternative to --cors flag)

envVarDetails.name: HAPI_CONFIG_FILES
envVarDetails.description: Comma-separated configuration files (alternative to --filename flag)

envVarDetails.name: NODE_ENV
envVarDetails.description: Node environment (development, production). 'development' enables verbose logging and debugging features.

name: 1lystore Mcp
description: MCP server for 1ly.store — buy/sell APIs and launch tokens on Bags.fm with USDC & $1LY.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_WALLET_SOLANA_KEY
envVarDetails.description: Path to Solana keypair JSON file (e.g. /home/user/.1ly/wallets/solana.json) or inline JSON byte array. Required for paid API calls and token tools (launch, trade, claim). Note: Claude Desktop does not expand ~, use absolute paths.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_WALLET_EVM_KEY
envVarDetails.description: Path to EVM private key file or 0x-prefixed hex string. Required for payments on Base network.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_API_KEY
envVarDetails.description: 1ly.store seller API key. Auto-saved locally after running the 1ly_create_store tool — you do not need to set this manually. Required for seller tools: manage links, stats, withdrawals, keys, and profile.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_WALLET_PROVIDER
envVarDetails.description: Wallet provider to use. 'raw' (default) uses local key files via ONELY_WALLET_SOLANA_KEY or ONELY_WALLET_EVM_KEY. 'coinbase' uses Coinbase Agentic Wallet (Base network only, requires the wallet app running locally).

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_NETWORK
envVarDetails.description: Preferred blockchain network for payments. 'solana' (default) or 'base'. Determines which wallet is used when an API supports both networks.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_SOLANA_RPC_URL
envVarDetails.description: Solana RPC endpoint URL. Defaults to https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com. Use a private RPC (e.g. Helius, Quicknode) for better reliability and rate limits.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_BUDGET_PER_CALL
envVarDetails.description: Maximum USD amount allowed per single paid API call. Defaults to 1.00. The server will refuse any call priced above this limit.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_BUDGET_DAILY
envVarDetails.description: Maximum total USD spending per calendar day (UTC). Defaults to 50.00. Resets at UTC midnight. The server will refuse calls that would exceed this limit.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_BUDGET_STATE_FILE
envVarDetails.description: Path to the local JSON file used to track daily spending. Defaults to ~/.1ly-mcp-budget.json. Created automatically with owner-only permissions (0600).

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_SOLANA_DRY_RUN
envVarDetails.description: Set to '1' to simulate Solana transactions without broadcasting to the blockchain. Returns a fake signature. Use for testing only — no real payments will be made.

envVarDetails.name: ONELY_API_BASE
envVarDetails.description: Override the 1ly.store API base URL. Defaults to https://1ly.store. Only http://localhost:PORT is accepted as an alternative (for local development). Do not change in production.

envVarDetails.description: PostgreSQL connection pool maximum size

envVarDetails.description: PostgreSQL command execution timeout in seconds

envVarDetails.description: Close idle PostgreSQL connections after this many seconds (0 to disable, default: 300)

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_MAX_QUERIES
envVarDetails.description: Recycle PostgreSQL connections after this many queries (0 to disable, default: 10000)

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_TCP_KEEPALIVES_IDLE_S
envVarDetails.description: Seconds of idle time before sending first TCP keepalive probe (0 to disable, default: 15)

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_TCP_KEEPALIVES_INTERVAL_S
envVarDetails.description: Seconds between subsequent TCP keepalive probes (0 to disable, default: 5)

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_TCP_KEEPALIVES_COUNT
envVarDetails.description: Number of failed TCP keepalive probes before connection is considered dead (0 to disable, default: 3)

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_STATEMENT_CACHE_SIZE
envVarDetails.description: asyncpg prepared statement cache size. Set to 0 for external pooler compatibility (PgBouncer transaction mode, Pgpool-II, etc.). Default: 100

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_MAX_CACHED_STATEMENT_LIFETIME_S
envVarDetails.description: Maximum lifetime of cached prepared statements in seconds (default: 300). Has no effect when statement_cache_size=0

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_MAX_CACHEABLE_STATEMENT_SIZE
envVarDetails.description: Maximum size of statement to cache in bytes (default: 15360). Has no effect when statement_cache_size=0

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_SSL_MODE
envVarDetails.description: PostgreSQL SSL mode (disable, allow, prefer, require, verify-ca, verify-full)

envVarDetails.name: POSTGRESQL_SCHEMA
envVarDetails.description: PostgreSQL schema name for table and index operations (default: public)

envVarDetails.description: Ollama context window size in tokens (default: 4096, range: 512-131072)

envVarDetails.description: Embedding model name for semantic search

envVarDetails.name: EMBEDDING_DIM
envVarDetails.description: Embedding vector dimensions

envVarDetails.description: Timeout in seconds for embedding generation API calls

envVarDetails.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for embedding generation

envVarDetails.name: EMBEDDING_RETRY_BASE_DELAY_S
envVarDetails.description: Base delay in seconds between retry attempts (with exponential backoff)

envVarDetails.name: EMBEDDING_MAX_CONCURRENT
envVarDetails.description: Maximum concurrent embedding generation operations (default: 3, range: 1-20)

envVarDetails.description: Enable full-text search functionality

envVarDetails.description: Language for FTS stemming (e.g., english, german, french)

envVarDetails.description: Characters of context around each FTS match for reranking passage extraction (default: 750)

envVarDetails.description: Merge FTS match regions within this character distance (default: 100)

envVarDetails.description: Enable hybrid search combining FTS and semantic search with RRF fusion

envVarDetails.name: HYBRID_RRF_K
envVarDetails.description: RRF smoothing constant for hybrid search (default 60)

envVarDetails.name: HYBRID_RRF_OVERFETCH
envVarDetails.description: Multiplier for over-fetching results before RRF fusion (default: 2)

envVarDetails.name: HYBRID_FTS_OR_THRESHOLD
envVarDetails.description: Minimum significant query terms to switch hybrid FTS from AND to OR logic (default: 4)

envVarDetails.name: SEARCH_DEFAULT_SORT_BY
envVarDetails.description: Default sort order for search results: relevance (only 'relevance' supported in current version)

envVarDetails.description: Enable text chunking for embedding generation (default: true)

envVarDetails.name: CHUNK_SIZE
envVarDetails.description: Target chunk size in characters (default: 1000)

envVarDetails.name: CHUNK_OVERLAP
envVarDetails.description: Overlap between chunks in characters (default: 100)

envVarDetails.name: CHUNK_AGGREGATION
envVarDetails.description: Chunk score aggregation method: max (only 'max' supported in current version)

envVarDetails.name: CHUNK_DEDUP_OVERFETCH
envVarDetails.description: Multiplier for over-fetching chunks before deduplication (default: 5)

envVarDetails.description: Enable cross-encoder reranking of search results (default: true)

envVarDetails.description: Reranking provider (default: flashrank)

envVarDetails.name: RERANKING_MODEL
envVarDetails.description: Reranking model name (default: ms-marco-MiniLM-L-12-v2)

envVarDetails.description: Maximum input length for reranking in tokens (default: 512)

envVarDetails.name: RERANKING_OVERFETCH
envVarDetails.description: Multiplier for over-fetching results before reranking (default: 4)

envVarDetails.name: RERANKING_CACHE_DIR
envVarDetails.description: Directory for caching reranking models

envVarDetails.name: RERANKING_CHARS_PER_TOKEN

envVarDetails.name: CB_CONNECTION_STRING
envVarDetails.description: Couchbase connection string. Required for connecting to the cluster.

envVarDetails.name: CB_USERNAME
envVarDetails.description: Couchbase database username. Required for basic authentication.

envVarDetails.name: CB_PASSWORD
envVarDetails.description: Couchbase database password. Required for basic authentication.

envVarDetails.name: CB_CA_CERT_PATH
envVarDetails.description: Couchbase CA certificate path. Required for TLS authentication in non Capella clusters.

envVarDetails.name: CB_CLIENT_CERT_PATH
envVarDetails.description: Couchbase client certificate path. Required for mTLS authentication.

envVarDetails.name: CB_CLIENT_KEY_PATH
envVarDetails.description: Couchbase client key path. Required for mTLS authentication.

envVarDetails.name: CB_MCP_READ_ONLY_MODE
envVarDetails.description: Couchbase read only mode. Set to true to allow disable write operations across both KV and query. KV write tools are not loaded and SQL++ queries that modify data are blocked. Set to false to allow data modification queries and tools.

envVarDetails.name: CB_MCP_READ_ONLY_QUERY_MODE
envVarDetails.description: [Deprecated] Couchbase read only query mode. Set to true to allow only read-only queries. Set to false to allow data modification queries. Use CB_MCP_READ_ONLY_MODE instead.

envVarDetails.name: CB_MCP_TRANSPORT
envVarDetails.description: Transport mode for the server (stdio, http or sse). Default is stdio

envVarDetails.name: CB_MCP_HOST
envVarDetails.description: Host to run the MCP server on (default: 127.0.0.1). Used only for HTTP and SSE transport modes.

envVarDetails.name: CB_MCP_PORT
envVarDetails.description: Port to run the MCP server on (default: 8000). Used only for HTTP and SSE transport modes.

envVarDetails.name: CB_MCP_DISABLED_TOOLS
envVarDetails.description: Tools to disable. Accepts comma-separated tool names (e.g., 'tool_1,tool_2') or a file path containing one tool name per line.

envVarDetails.description: When set to true, allows configuration values to be overridden via request headers and query parameters.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_ID
envVarDetails.description: Atlas API client ID for authentication. Required for running Atlas tools.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_API_CLIENT_SECRET
envVarDetails.description: Atlas API client secret for authentication. Required for running Atlas tools.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_ASSISTANT_BASE_URL
envVarDetails.description: Base URL for the MongoDB Assistant API.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_ATLAS_TEMPORARY_DATABASE_USER_LIFETIME_MS
envVarDetails.description: Time in milliseconds that temporary database users created when connecting to MongoDB Atlas clusters will remain active before being automatically deleted.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED_TOOLS
envVarDetails.description: Comma separated values of tool names that require user confirmation before execution. Requires the client to support elicitation.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_CONNECTION_STRING
envVarDetails.description: MongoDB connection string for direct database connections. Optional, if not set, you'll need to call the connect tool before interacting with MongoDB data.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_DISABLED_TOOLS
envVarDetails.description: Comma separated values of tool names, operation types, and/or categories of tools that will be disabled.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_DRY_RUN
envVarDetails.description: When true, runs the server in dry mode: dumps configuration and enabled tools, then exits without starting the server.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_EMBEDDINGS_VALIDATION
envVarDetails.description: When set to false, disables validation of embeddings dimensions.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_EXPORT_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS
envVarDetails.description: Time in milliseconds between export cleanup cycles that remove expired export files.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_EXPORT_TIMEOUT_MS
envVarDetails.description: Time in milliseconds after which an export is considered expired and eligible for cleanup.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_EXPORTS_PATH
envVarDetails.description: Folder to store exported data files.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_EXTERNALLY_MANAGED_SESSIONS
envVarDetails.description: When true, the HTTP transport allows requests with a session ID supplied externally through the 'mcp-session-id' header. When an external ID is supplied, the initialization request is optional.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_HEALTH_CHECK_HOST
envVarDetails.description: Host address to bind the healthCheck HTTP server to (only used when transport is 'http'). If provided, `healthCheckPort` must also be set.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_HEALTH_CHECK_PORT
envVarDetails.description: Port number for the healthCheck HTTP server (only used when transport is 'http'). If provided, `healthCheckHost` must also be set.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_HTTP_BODY_LIMIT
envVarDetails.description: Maximum size of the HTTP request body in bytes (only used when transport is 'http'). This value is passed as the optional limit parameter to the Express.js json() middleware.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_HTTP_HEADERS
envVarDetails.description: Header that the HTTP server will validate when making requests (only used when transport is 'http').

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_HTTP_HOST
envVarDetails.description: Host address to bind the HTTP server to (only used when transport is 'http').

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_HTTP_PORT
envVarDetails.description: Port number for the HTTP server (only used when transport is 'http'). Use 0 for a random port.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_HTTP_RESPONSE_TYPE
envVarDetails.description: The HTTP response type for tool responses: 'sse' for Server-Sent Events, 'json' for standard JSON responses.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS
envVarDetails.description: Idle timeout for a client to disconnect (only applies to http transport).

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_INDEX_CHECK
envVarDetails.description: When set to true, enforces that query operations must use an index, rejecting queries that perform a collection scan.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_LOG_PATH
envVarDetails.description: Folder to store logs.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_LOGGERS
envVarDetails.description: Comma separated values of logger types.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_MAX_BYTES_PER_QUERY
envVarDetails.description: The maximum size in bytes for results from a find or aggregate tool call. This serves as an upper bound for the responseBytesLimit parameter in those tools.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_MAX_DOCUMENTS_PER_QUERY
envVarDetails.description: The maximum number of documents that can be returned by a find or aggregate tool call. For the find tool, the effective limit will be the smaller of this value and the tool's limit parameter.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_NOTIFICATION_TIMEOUT_MS
envVarDetails.description: Notification timeout for a client to be aware of disconnect (only applies to http transport).

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_PREVIEW_FEATURES
envVarDetails.description: Comma separated values of preview features that are enabled.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_READ_ONLY
envVarDetails.description: When set to true, only allows read, connect, and metadata operation types, disabling create/update/delete operations.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_TELEMETRY
envVarDetails.description: When set to disabled, disables telemetry collection.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_TRANSPORT
envVarDetails.description: Either 'stdio' or 'http'.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_VECTOR_SEARCH_DIMENSIONS
envVarDetails.description: Default number of dimensions for vector search embeddings.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_VECTOR_SEARCH_SIMILARITY_FUNCTION
envVarDetails.description: Default similarity function for vector search: 'euclidean', 'cosine', or 'dotProduct'.

envVarDetails.name: MDB_MCP_VOYAGE_API_KEY
envVarDetails.description: API key for Voyage AI embeddings service (required for vector search operations with text-to-embedding conversion).

envVarDetails.description: Grouping mode for quality filtering. 'similar' returns only the most similar group (stops at first distance jump). 'related' includes related groups (stops at second distance jump). Unset means no grouping filter

envVarDetails.name: RAG_MAX_FILES
envVarDetails.description: Maximum number of files to keep in search results. Results are filtered to include only chunks from the top N best-scoring files. For example, 1 returns only the single best-matching file's chunks. Unset means no file filtering.
